name: mark-flow
description: Read-only Codex access to MarkFlow Hub scripts, daily scripts, catalogs, comments, and review timelines through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Search and inspect MarkFlow content through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the MarkFlow Hub read-only MCP server for searching scripts and daily scripts, opening details and comments, listing catalog data, and reading review timelines.
defaultPrompt: Search MarkFlow scripts about a topic.
Open a MarkFlow script with comments.
List MarkFlow teams, classes, and subjects.
